members.name: clipA
members.description: The clip being executed or blended from.

members.name: currentClip
members.description: Clip A before the start of a transition, clip B otherwise.

members.name: currentFrame
members.description: The frame index of the current clip output.

members.name: currentTime
members.description: The time value of the current clip output.

members.name: endBlendTime
members.description: The time at which the transition is complete.

members.name: isBlending
members.description: True if the output is transitioning between clips.

members.name: isQueued
members.description: True if transitions are delayed until current transition completes.

members.name: isTriggerWaiting
members.description: True if there is a pending triggered transition.

members.name: nextClip
members.description: The next clip to be sequenced.

members.name: startBlendTime
members.description: The time the transition will start.

methods.name: trigger
methods.description: Trigger the next clip in sequence. *clipCHOP - (Optional) If specified, the Clip CHOP it is inserted into the queue. *waitEnd - When True, wait until the end of the current clip before triggering.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ClipblenderCHOP Class wiki page
